resources.notes: Official modules tutorial: import, from...import, as, namespacing, packages.
Official venv + pip tutorial: creating/activating virtual environments, installing packages.
Brief tour of the standard library, covering random, math, datetime.
Official Poetry docs: poetry new, project init, dependency management.
Official pytest docs: writing and running a first test.
